operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Gaza War: 877 Days — 61,900+ Killed, Rafah Crossing Reopens, Hamas Disarmament Proposal Tabled
heroSubtitle: From Hamas's October 7 attack through two ceasefire deals: 251 hostages eventually accounted for, Gaza reconstruction 'Board of Peace' framework emerges as Israel-Iran war reshapes region; 2026 humanitarian appeal 93% unfunded
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 61,900+ confirmed + 14,200+ missing = ~76,100+ total (OCHA, Mar 2026). 2026 Flash Appeal: $4.1B required, 7.2% funded.
